name: Paella Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (14-3/4 Oz.) Diced Tomatoes In Juice
2 Cups diced cooked chicken or turkey
1 Package (6 Oz.) Frozen Cooked Shrimp, thawed, rinsed and drained
2 Cups (8 Oz.) Sargento 4 Cheese Country Casserole Recipe Blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions using tomatoes.
2. Remove from heat; stir in chicken, peas, and shrimp.
3. Spoon half of rice mixture into an 11 x 7-inch baking dish.
4. Sprinkle with 1 cup Sargento 4 Cheese Country Casserole Recipe Blend.
5. Top with remaining rice mixture.
6. Cover with foil; bake at 375°F for 25 minutes or until heated through.
7. Uncover; sprinkle with remaining 1 cup cheese.
8. Let stand 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
